title: Sainfoin Cloning SOP
author: Aci, Murat
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
TLI - Perennial Legumes Program  
  Document Title : Sainfoin Cloning 
  SOP_ID : TLI_PLP_10.5281/zenodo.10041247 
  Version : 1.0.0 
  Summary : The purpose of this document is to detail the main procedures and materials needed to take cuttings from a mature sainfoin plant from the field or greenhouse, and propagate them, taking care to minimize disease, etc. The purpose of cloning sainfoin plants is to maintain original genotypes for use in synthetic populations/cultivars and replicated/multisite genomic studies since sainfoin seeds do not produce plants which are true-to-type.
